channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vance clashes with 'The View' hosts over Epstein files, says nothing is being withheld
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance debated the ABC talk show's panel on Tuesday regarding the release of Epstein-related documents.

item.title: J.D. Vance attributes planned attacks on UFC event to left-wing rhetoric
item.description: The vice president responded to reports that authorities thwarted attacks aimed at a UFC event, blaming political discourse from the left.

item.title: Lawsuit filed against Trump's National Garden of American Heroes
item.description: Several Washington preservation groups have sued the Trump administration over the proposed memorial, citing legal concerns.

item.title: MLB threatens Christian players over faith expressions despite 'Baseball Is For Everyone' claim
item.description: Major League Baseball warned several San Francisco Giants players after they displayed Bible verses, contradicting its inclusive messaging.
